name: Grilled Leg of Lamb with Olive Relish
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
5 1/2 pound leg of lamb, trimmed, boned and butterflied (about 3 pounds)
1/2 pound boneless lamb, up to 4 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the red wine vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, red pepper flakes, shallot, garlic, pepper, and salt. Whisk in the olive oil.
2. Trim as much remaining fat as possible from the lamb. Place the lamb in a shallow dish and spread the oil mixture over both sides.
3. Prepare the grill or heat a grill pan over medium heat. Bring the lamb to room temperature. Grill on an oiled rack set 5 to 6 inches over glowing coals for 10 to 12 minutes on each side, or until a meat thermometer registers 140°F for medium rare.
4. Alternatively, grill the lamb on a grill pan for about the same amount of time per side.
5. Transfer the lamb to a cutting board and let stand 10 minutes. Slice thinly across the grain.
6. Serve with relish.
Yield: 4 servings
